diagrams.title: Thrashing Curve
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between CPU utilization and degree of multiprogramming
elements: Arrow showing direction of increasing processes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding optimal operating point and thrashing behavior

diagrams.title: Working Set Model
diagrams.description: Illustrates how working set is determined using time window τ
elements: Window of size τ sliding across timeline
Pages within window highlighted as working set
Pages outside window marked for replacement
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how working set captures recent page references

diagrams.title: Page Fault Frequency Control
diagrams.description: Shows PFF thresholds for frame allocation
elements: Graph of Page Fault Rate vs Time
Three zones: Above upper (allocate frames), Between thresholds (optimal), Below lower (reclaim frames)
